title: tephrosia lebrunii
intro: Tephrosia lebrunii, also known as the Lebrun's horsefly tree, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Tephrosia lebrunii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to lower blood pressure. Tephrosia lebrunii can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are traditionally used in African and Asian folk medicine.
